---
title: "Week 08: Professional Python"
---

## Introduction

Coming soon!

## Recommended readings

- [Python tutorial](https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/) - Official Python documentation

## Lectures

- [**Slides: Professional Python**](../slides/IS4010_W08_Professional_Python.qmd)

## Lab assignment

- [Lab 08: Professional Python](https://github.com/bgreenwell/is4010-course)
